activation_source: project flow and maintained script surface
design_intent_summary: Use one governed Stage2 entrypoint for live and replay execution.
why_it_exists: Prevents wrapper drift and alternative Stage2 definitions.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Agents or operators may choose non-maintained wrappers or stale authority surfaces.
notes: The maintained registry and runbook both name this as the authoritative Stage2 entrypoint.

design_intent_summary: Keep Stage2 semantic authority LLM-led and composite rather than deterministic-source.
why_it_exists: Prevents silent semantic-authority drift back into deterministic emitters.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Mixed or undeclared semantic-source mode undermines Stage2 authority and downstream trust.
notes: Current maintained default is llm_first_composite.

design_intent_summary: Fail governed runs when semantic provenance, semantic-source mode, or lawful expansion rules are violated.
why_it_exists: Prevents silent acceptance of authority drift and unlawful deterministic expansion.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Rows can materialize without semantic provenance or lawful scope.
notes: Validator also enforces marker-readiness rules and specific function-unit modes.

feature_name: Completed Stage2 artifact is the only lawful Stage3 resume boundary
design_intent_summary: Only the completed Stage2 compatibility artifact may feed Stage3.
why_it_exists: Separates internal semantic intermediates from lawful downstream authority.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Replay baselines or semantic-object-only artifacts may be treated as if they were lawful Stage3 inputs.
notes: Boundary Governance should always point Stage3 to the completed Stage2 artifact.

design_intent_summary: Perform deterministic post-LLM completion inside Stage2 without changing stage numbering.
why_it_exists: Allows unchanged downstream Stage3 and Stage5 consumers to receive a completed Stage2 contract.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Stage2 semantic output remains unusable by downstream stages or is mis-evaluated as complete.
notes: This is inside Stage2, not a separate numbered stage.

design_intent_summary: Allow replay of saved live-v2 raw responses through maintained Stage2 to rebuild authoritative completed artifacts.
why_it_exists: Prevents raw-freeze diagnostics from becoming dead ends.
expected_runtime_artifact: RUN_CONTEXT.md source_mode and legacy_raw_responses_dir;completed Stage2 artifacts
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Replay mode may yield zero rows or fail to reconstruct current-schema outputs.
notes: Current QLYK replay run 17 proves this path exists and rebuilds completed Stage2 artifacts.

design_intent_summary: Allow live Stage2 prompts to use a controlled evidence pack instead of raw-prefix text.
why_it_exists: Improves evidence locality and makes prompt order auditable when explicitly enabled.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Real prompt can stay raw-prefix and dilute or hide high-value evidence.
notes: QLYK live run kept this feature off, which is why the prompt stayed raw_prefix_then_table_excerpts. Adjudicated runtime input contract; outside feature-unit system.

activation_source: live Stage2 prompt build emits preview rows
design_intent_summary: Write a run-local prompt-preview surface that records prompt layout and packing mode.
why_it_exists: Needed to distinguish code existence from actual live prompt assembly.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Live prompt ordering becomes non-auditable; replay runs can hide original prompt shape.
notes: Replay runs do not rebuild a live prompt preview, so the original live run must be inspected. Observability only; not an execution feature.

design_intent_summary: Switch appended table handling from raw excerpt mode to summary rendering.
why_it_exists: Reduces noisy raw CSV payloads and allows controlled table summarization experiments.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Table excerpts stay noisy or front-matter heavy when summary mode was intended.
notes: The maintained path supports summary mode, but QLYK was audited in full mode, not summary mode. Adjudicated runtime input contract; required by default for Stage2 formulation extraction review scope.

design_intent_summary: Prioritize summary-table first-column information when requested.
why_it_exists: Supports bounded summary-mode experiments that emphasize row labels or identifiers.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Row-label signals remain weak inside summary-mode prompts even when the feature was expected.
notes: Exists in maintained code but is not included in the current feature-unit registry. Adjudicated runtime input contract subfeature; optional and outside feature-unit system.

design_intent_summary: Use raw paper-text prefix plus appended table excerpts when ordered packing is off.
why_it_exists: Records the current maintained default so it cannot be mistaken for optimized ordering.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Default layout may obscure localized evidence and overexpose noisy front-prefix text.
notes: This is the actual QLYK live prompt layout. Fallback only; explicitly not default-safe.

activation_source: LLM-declared table authorization plus compatible tables
design_intent_summary: Deterministically enumerate explicit non-DOE formulation table rows when semantically authorized.
why_it_exists: Preserves row-local table structure without reverting to field-first semantic sourcing.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Table-bearing formulation rows stay collapsed or never materialize.
notes: QLYK summary files show table_row_expansion_rows=0, so this unit was present but not the relevant mechanism.

activation_source: explicit stagewise selection evidence and no DOE scope
design_intent_summary: Resolve one optimized formulation row from a stagewise optimization paper without cross-table cartesian merges.
why_it_exists: Addresses QLYKLPKT-like stagewise optimization cases that are not DOE expansions.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Sequential optimization papers may remain unresolved or produce non-literal placeholder rows.
notes: Current QLYK run summaries show triggered=true and materialized=true.

feature_name: DOE row expansion within LLM-declared scope
design_intent_summary: Permit deterministic DOE row recovery only under LLM-declared DOE scope in llm-first mode.
why_it_exists: Preserves DOE capability without restoring deterministic semantic authority.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: DOE papers can under-enumerate or deterministic logic can overreach outside lawful semantic scope.
notes: This is actively governed and separately audited by the feature-unit layer.

design_intent_summary: Preserve semantically real selection cues even when some grounding fields remain incomplete.
why_it_exists: Prevents all-or-nothing marker suppression from erasing useful semantic understanding.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Selection cues disappear entirely, starving downstream governed execution or audit.
notes: This is maintained contract behavior, not just a note.

design_intent_summary: Preserve semantically real inheritance cues when table-link fields remain incomplete.
why_it_exists: Reduces suppression of inheritance understanding in difficult papers.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Inheritance cues vanish instead of being retained for audit or future contract evolution.
notes: Execution remains narrow even when partial inheritance markers are preserved.

activation_source: adapter filters partial_semantic markers from execution-facing rows
design_intent_summary: Keep partial markers in semantic intermediates while handing only execution_ready markers to unchanged downstream runtime.
why_it_exists: Allows narrow contract relaxation without broadening deterministic execution authority.
expected_runtime_artifact: completed Stage2 artifacts carry execution-ready semantics only
current_observability_surface: semantic intermediate vs completed Stage2 comparison
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Downstream execution may consume under-grounded markers or semantics may be lost entirely.
notes: This is the current Stage2-to-downstream handshake rule.

activation_source: conservative syntax-first sanitation before strict parse
design_intent_summary: Apply low-risk syntax cleanup before parsing saved raw Stage2 JSON.
why_it_exists: Prevents malformed raw-response text from forcing avoidable failures.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Parse errors may be over-attributed to model semantics instead of syntax-only breakage.
notes: The feature is registered but current activation reporting still lacks an observer implementation.

design_intent_summary: Retain the broader historical fixparse path as a diagnostic-only fallback basis.
why_it_exists: Documents prior rescue behavior without re-promoting it into mainline authority.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Broad historical repair may silently rewrite semantics if mistaken for current mainline behavior.
notes: Present in feature-unit governance but intentionally not mainline.

design_intent_summary: Separate code existence from run-local activation with artifact-based checks.
why_it_exists: Prevents silent reuse of stale artifacts from looking like feature activation.
current_observability_surface: feature activation report and RUN_CONTEXT summary
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Features appear solved in code or child runs but were not active in the audited run.
notes: The new recovery inventory extends beyond this narrower existing registry.

design_intent_summary: Write activation report path, required features, and gate directly into RUN_CONTEXT.md.
why_it_exists: Makes governed run metadata reproducibility-grade instead of analysis-only.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Missing feature activation lineage becomes easy to miss during debugging or lineage reuse.
notes: This is required observability for governed run-producing wrappers.

design_intent_summary: Record boundary_class, lawful resume status, replay mode, and authority source for governed runs.
why_it_exists: Prevents replayable diagnostics from being confused with lawful resume boundaries.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Agents may replay the wrong artifact layer or misclassify benchmark authority.
notes: Qlyk run 17 shows replay-specific boundary metadata.

design_intent_summary: Force benchmark, workbook, comparison, and audit workflows to resolve sources explicitly.
why_it_exists: Prevents recency-based or glob-based source drift.
expected_runtime_artifact: sidecar metadata and explicit source fields in RUN_CONTEXT and outputs
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Wrong lineage or stale child run can be treated as the active source.
notes: The recovery report should cite this whenever results artifacts are audited.

design_intent_summary: Build reviewer-facing audit rows from frozen Stage5 final outputs plus provenance.
why_it_exists: Provides canonical reviewer seed surfaces and evidence handoff.
current_observability_surface: audit-ready TSV and downstream workbook seeds
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Review tooling may fall back to stale or non-canonical row seeds.
notes: Current governance says latest final table plus audit-ready export are canonical for reviewer surfaces.

design_intent_summary: Assign deterministic LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH risk and INCLUDE/REVIEW/HOLD flags from identity comparison outputs.
why_it_exists: Supports reviewer prioritization without mutating benchmark-valid outputs.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: High-residual papers may be treated as routine review cases or low-risk drift may be over-escalated.
notes: This is audit planning support, not a benchmark behavior change.

feature_name: DOI-level GT vs prediction count audit
design_intent_summary: Write DOI-level GT/prediction count deltas for compare runs.
why_it_exists: Enables per-paper mismatch localization from final outputs.
current_observability_surface: compare artifact and feature activation report
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Count mismatches remain buried in aggregate summaries.
notes: Should only be expected for compare runs, not Stage2-only diagnostics.

activation_source: compare artifact proves v2 workbook usage
design_intent_summary: Use and record the current variant-aware DEV15 GT workbook in benchmark compare outputs.
why_it_exists: Prevents benchmark authority drift back to older GT workbooks.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Compare runs may silently use an outdated GT workbook.
notes: Current feature activation logic over-requires this feature even for Stage2-only runs; that mismatch is tracked separately in the gap watchlist.

activation_source: Stage5 duplicate and variant governance trace
design_intent_summary: Retain or collapse Stage5 rows conservatively based on explicit family and variant evidence.
why_it_exists: Prevents over-collapse or broad duplicate hacks from changing formulation identity.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Final outputs may undercount or over-collapse family and variant structures.
notes: Activation must come from the run-local Stage5 trace, not from code existence.

feature_name: Governed memory bootstrap and query surface
activation_source: complex debugging should query memory first
design_intent_summary: Query governed memory before repeated debugging or lineage analysis.
why_it_exists: Prevents repeated rediscovery of prior failures, decisions, and runs.
expected_runtime_artifact: memory query output in terminal or audit notes
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Past decisions and prior solved regressions can be forgotten between sessions.
notes: This recovery task explicitly used memory as required by repo governance.

source_of_truth: Retain the Stage2.5 text-only evidence-pack builder as shadow design history, not active mainline.

current_observability_surface: Agents may assume Stage2.5 is still active or that its pack builder is current Stage2 behavior.
known_failure_mode_if_missing: none
omission_risk: Useful for recovery inventory because prior evidence-pack intent lived here.

known_failure_mode_if_missing: stage2_input_evidence_packing_ordered_blocks
omission_risk: Keep as recovered intent; do not treat as current maintained behavior.

source_of_truth: Promote synthesis-method and procurement paragraphs ahead of tables in the deprecated extractor.

why_it_exists: legacy packed prompt with SYNTHESIS_METHOD_BLOCK/MATERIALS_PROCUREMENT_BLOCK
current_observability_surface: Teams can believe synthesis-first ordering is maintained when it is historical only.

source_of_truth: Add row-enumeration instructions for table-heavy papers in the deprecated extractor.

why_it_exists: legacy prompt variants in old extractor
current_observability_surface: Prompt-side historical fixes may be mistaken for current maintained input behavior.

activation_source: explicit governed fallback or diagnostic comparator declaration
design_intent_summary: Retain deterministic semantic emitter only as fallback, comparator, or migration-support infrastructure.
why_it_exists: Preserves useful historical capability without granting it default Stage2 authority.
expected_runtime_artifact: RUN_CONTEXT.md with explicit governed_fallback_semantic_source or diagnostic comparator declaration
known_failure_mode_if_missing: If used implicitly, deterministic semantic emission can silently replace LLM-first Stage2 authority.

design_intent_summary: Keep non-governance registries aligned with maintained Stage2 authority.
why_it_exists: Prevents auxiliary docs from reintroducing stale authority narratives.
expected_runtime_artifact: Updated docs surface consistent with maintained runbook
current_observability_surface: diff between tool_index and maintained authority docs
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Users may follow an outdated document and select the wrong Stage2 authority.
notes: docs/tool_index.md still says emit_semantic_objects_from_cleaned_papers_v1.py is the authoritative Stage2 boundary.

feature_name: Summary-mode features represented in code but not in current feature-unit registry
design_intent_summary: Bring maintained summary mode and summary-first-column activation under the same expected-vs-actual governance as ordered packing.
why_it_exists: Without explicit registry coverage, summary features can exist in code and runs without durable governance visibility.
expected_runtime_artifact: future feature-unit registry entries and observers
current_observability_surface: manual audit or expanded feature registry
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Summary-mode regressions may be rediscovered repeatedly because they are not formally checked.
notes: This recovery package inventories them even though the existing feature-unit layer does not. superseded_by: adjudicated input-contract boundary; input-construction features are intentionally outside feature-unit system.

activation_source: replay branch does not rebuild live prompt preview
design_intent_summary: Make it explicit that replay runs can rebuild completed Stage2 artifacts without regenerating the original live prompt-preview surface.
why_it_exists: Prevents replay diagnostics from being mistaken for direct evidence of original prompt assembly.
expected_runtime_artifact: replay RUN_CONTEXT plus parent live prompt preview
current_observability_surface: Boundary Governance;prompt preview in parent live run
known_failure_mode_if_missing: Debuggers may audit the replay child only and miss that the parent live prompt used different visibility conditions.
notes: Current QLYK investigation depended on tracing back from run 17 replay to run 12 live prompt preview. Observability-only replay limitation; not an execution feature.

feature_name: Locality-preserving literal-binding evidence pack for sequential optimization
source_of_truth: Protect A/B/C sequential-optimization evidence locality when literal selection and carry-forward cues are split by default packing.

why_it_exists: not implemented
current_observability_surface: The system can repeatedly re-encounter abstract-fallback failures in stagewise optimization papers.

activation_source: ordered input packing branch in build_controlled_evidence_pack

known_failure_mode_if_missing: Stage2 can expose irrelevant tables or omit the formulation-bearing ones even when summary mode is desired.
notes: Adjudicated runtime input contract; required by default for Stage2 formulation extraction scope; outside feature-unit system.

design_intent_summary: Expose the named Stage2 prompt layout class for run-local audit.
why_it_exists: Lets debugging distinguish ordered evidence packs, raw-prefix fallback, and other layout families without inspecting code.

design_intent_summary: Expose the ordered or fallback block sequence used by the Stage2 prompt builder.
